english_text: I am telling you this in confidence
You are the only one who knows
Promise me you will not tell anyone
I have never told anyone this
I will take it to my grave
Your secret is safe with me
I swear I am telling the truth
I will always have your back
I feel like I can open up to you
That was supposed to be private
Do not let this get out
korean_text: 이거 밖으로 새 나가면 안 돼
romanization: igeo bakkeuro sae nagamyeon an dwae

english_text: I have a confession to make
It is hard to trust people
Once trust is broken it is hard to fix
I should not have trusted them
I will be honest with you
I caught them in a lie
Truth hurts but lies hurt more
I have no reason to lie
I cannot keep this inside anymore
Only share what you are comfortable with
I would never spread your business
korean_text: 네 일을 남한테 말 안 해
romanization: ne ireul namhante mal an hae

english_text: Some things are better left unsaid
korean_text: 말 안 하는 게 나은 것도 있어
romanization: mal an haneun ge naeun geotdo isseo

korean_text: 네가 믿을 만한 사람이란 걸 증명했어
romanization: nega mideul manhan saramiran geol jeungmyeonghaesseo

english_text: I feel safe talking to you
Your words mean a lot to me
